title: Command Package Schema Boundary
goal: Implement #432 by giving the generic command-package IR schema a lift-out-friendly owner while keeping Agentic Workspace command facts workspace-owned.
non_goals: Do not move workspace command-package IR data out of src/agentic_workspace/contracts.
Do not publish an external schema package.
Do not add first-contact product surfaces.

intent.outcome: Generic command-generation schema ownership is visible under packages/command-generation and checked for drift against the workspace validation path.
intent.constraints: Keep root contract validation working and avoid startup expansion.
intent.latitude: Mirror the generic schema and add a contract-tooling drift check.
intent.escalation: Escalate if schema movement would break existing workspace contract loading.

execution.next_step: Archive the completed execplan, commit, push, close #432, then continue #433.
execution.proof: contract tooling checks, generated package checks, ruff, planning surfaces, and proof selector.

invariants: Workspace command-package IR data remains workspace-owned.
Workspace contract validation remains unchanged for consumers.
The generic schema mirror cannot drift silently.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #430 isolate generic command-generation machinery for future extraction

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Generic schema ownership becomes visible before loader/check decoupling.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: #433 generic loader/check decoupling, #434 consumer wrapper clarity, #435 lift-out criteria.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Dogfood package surfaces, commit/push milestone, close issue only after proof.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact schema mirror wording and drift-check placement.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A change would move workspace command facts or break existing contract validation.

active_milestone.scope: generic schema mirror and drift check

immediate_next_action: Archive completed plan and close #432 after commit/push.
invariants: No workspace command facts move in this slice.
Existing contract tooling remains the workspace consumer path.
Schema drift is visible through ordinary checks.
validation_commands: uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed packages/command-generation/schemas/ packages/command-generation/README.md scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/command-package-schema-boundary.plan.json --format json
uv run ruff check src tests scripts packages/command-generation/src
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section workflow_obligations --format json
uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section closeout_trust --format json
completion_criteria: Generic command-package schema has a lift-out-friendly package-owned copy.
Workspace command-package IR data remains workspace-owned.
Root contract tooling verifies the package-owned schema mirror does not drift.
No first-contact product surface is added.

execution_run.what happened: Mirrored the generic command-package IR schema under packages/command-generation/schemas, documented the ownership split in the internal package README, and added a contract-tooling drift check plus regression coverage.
execution_run.scope touched: generic schema mirror, contract-tooling check, contract-tooling tests, internal package README, planning residue
execution_run.validations run: uv run agentic-workspace preflight --target . --format json; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed packages/command-generation/schemas/ packages/command-generation/README.md scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/command-package-schema-boundary.plan.json --format json; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run pytest tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests scripts packages/command-generation/src; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section workflow_obligations --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section closeout_trust --format json; uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json
execution_run.result for continuation: #432 is satisfied; #430 remains open and should continue with #433 generic loader/check decoupling.
execution_run.next step: Archive plan, commit, push, close #432, refresh external evidence, then promote #433.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Generic command-package schema ownership is now visible under packages/command-generation while Agentic Workspace command facts remain workspace-owned.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: Contract tooling, generated package checks, contract tooling tests, workspace CLI tests, ruff, planning surfaces, proof selection, planning doctor, workflow obligations, closeout trust, and reconcile passed.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Archived execplan, package README, contract-tooling check output, and #432 closure comment carry the durable evidence.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): No Memory or config promotion was needed.

proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: Contract tooling reports the command-generation schema boundary as current; contract tooling tests passed (28); workspace CLI tests passed (188); generated package static proof, ruff, planning surfaces, proof selector, planning doctor, workflow obligations, closeout trust, and reconcile passed.

intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: packages/command-generation/schemas/command_package_ir.schema.json mirrors the workspace validation schema, README documents generic schema ownership versus workspace-owned IR data, and contract tooling enforces mirror parity.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The bounded slice is complete and remaining intent is routed to a checked-in continuation owner.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Prepared closeout records intent satisfaction, closure decision, proof evidence, and distillation buckets.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen when .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml roadmap activates a fresh bounded slice.

discard.summary: Command-by-command execution detail stays in the archived proof record.

continuation.summary: #433 loader/check decoupling remains the next #430 child.

memory.summary: No Memory or config promotion was needed.

config_check.summary: No Memory or config promotion was needed.

issue_follow_up.summary: #432 can close after this milestone is committed and pushed.

drift_log: 2026-04-28: Added package-owned generic schema mirror and contract-tooling drift check.
